title: ceratozamia mirandae
intro: Ceratozamia mirandae is a species of cycad, a group of seed plants that are characterized by their palm-like appearance and cones. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves of Ceratozamia mirandae have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
